Media Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 5th November, 2004 at 15:37 GMT
  
Hey, all the media is now back up except for the non-db episodes. There are still alot of things to do to to the media server, i.e. connection limiting. If I find anyone opening multiple connections to the server or using a download manager their ip will be blocked. I'll post another update later.
Slight Delay (Won't effect db media)
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 3rd November, 2004 at 15:12 GMT
  
Hey, thanks very much for the donations last month, and thanks for those which have come in so far this month. This news post is just to notify you that not all the non-dragonball media will not be ready by friday because I had some internet connection problems yestarday, I'm approximately 21 hours behind shedule at the moment. So far I've uploaded all the dragonball stuff and the anime movies, I've only just been able to start uploading the episodes of other animes.
Donations
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 29th October, 2004 at 10:55 GMT
  
Hey, thanks to all those who have donated money this month, it's greatly appreciated, unfortunately it has only come to make up a third of our monthly goal. We have about two days to get the remaining $200 dollars, if everyone (not just people who usually donate) could chip in a small ammount we would reach out goal very quickly. As a bit of extra insentive those who donate over $5 can have access to any media of their choosing on high-speed download. Thank you.
Status On Media + Competition Close
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 28th October, 2004 at 12:36 GMT
  
Hey, just a qick update with regard to the media...I'm one day behind due to some internet connection problems. So far i've uploaded all the movies and the dragonball episodes. I have 19GB left to upload which should take approximately 9 days.

Today is your last chance to send in your competition entries and a have a chance at winning the ghost in the shell dvd.
Back Home....News On Media
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 22nd October, 2004 at 10:56 GMT
  
Hey, sorry the site has been a bit desolate for the past week; I was in northern scottland doing a survival course. I've managed to find us a new media server and have begun uploading, you will be able to download again in 12 days time (Approximately 3rd November). I would like to thank the people who have kept donating even though the media is down, It's really helping. Also, keep sending in those competition entries, this month's competition is going really well. I'll post another update in a few days, untill then cya.
Anime Reviews
 

Posted By: Final_Kodiak
Date: Wednesday 13th October, 2004 at 22:33 GMT
  
Hi everyone,
While you are all patiently waiting for the media to be restored, I encourage you all to check out our "anime reviews" section. I will personally be working on many anime reviews in the near future, and if you have any more thoughts to contribute, just drop me an instant message via MSN or email.
Not Again.....
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 8th October, 2004 at 15:15 GMT
  
We had the website going with no media problems for over a month, thought it was all ok, but no. Our host as cut off relations with one of its datacenters because of a pay dispute, the datacenter has removed all of our host's servers and wiped their hard drives. So basically all the media has gone. I'm currently trying to find another host...it'll be a while before all the media will be back up again....my suggestion is to wait out the time on the forums....I'll post updates regularly. Sorry guys ~
Media Still Down
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 6th October, 2004 at 15:21 GMT
  
Hey, i'm really sorry but the media is still down. It appears as though the problem is a bit more serious than I first imaginged. Hopefully everything will be working by tomorrow. Cya ;)
October's Prize Draw
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 2nd October, 2004 at 13:28 GMT
  
Hey, you can now enter october's prize draw for a chance to win the Ghost In The Shell dvd. CLICK HERE FOR DETAILS OF THE COMPETITION. I've also added episode 14 of the ghost in the shell series...you can find that in the episodes section.

With regard to donations and media....as I've raised the donations goal this month, I'm going to try and get a new server, which can be used to help balance the load for the more popular downloads. Also If you donate more than $5 this month, just message me over msn or aim and I'll let you download any media of your choice off of my home server.
Newest Staff Member
 

Posted By: Final_Kodiak
Date: Friday 1st October, 2004 at 20:00 GMT
  
Hey everyone, get ready for a total revival of the anime reviews section, as I will be focusing purely on it for the next few months.
Feel free to email me, at my DBGT email inbox, or dreadedseaner@hotmail.com, and let me know what you want to hear reviews of!

Most respectfully, Final Kodiak.
